name: @pryzm/plugin-visibility-intent
description: PRYZM 2 — empty visibility-intent plugin shell (F-prereq.0). The Visual rail (CreateRailPanel sibling) routes its Visibility-Graphics + edge/transparency/isolate/hide/reveal gestures through this plugin per PRYZM2-WIREUP-PLAN-S72 §16.6.1 F.1.59-F.1.65 + §16.6.3 F.8.x. The rail surface is named 'Visual'; the plugin is named 'visibility-intent' (canonical).
